project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.LogixDb.Service.executor": "Debug", "023f2559-4d27-4bd0-b75c-e1f573990a1d.executor": "Debug", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/tnunnink/Documents/Projects/logixdb/src/LogixDb.sln", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "preferences.sourceCode.SQL", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "TSQL", "SQLite" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Add clustered indexes to various migration tables and update primary key definitions where applicable
Add database-specific table creation logic and index updates for `tag_member` and `data_type_member` tables.
Bump version to 0.12.4 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add database-specific logic for `rung` table creation and indexing in migration
Bump version to 0.12.5 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add fake tag and program generation logic to `TestSource.Fake` for improved test data creation
Update migrations to add unique indexes for `target_component` and `target_version_map` tables and enhance `TestSource` with public fake data generators and tests.
Mark `ExecuteQuery_AfterLargeNumberOfFakeImports_ShouldBePerformant` test as explicit for ongoing work on high-load query stress testing.
Bump version to 0.12.6 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Update `M20260206Tests` to assert `component_id` column type as `tinyint`
Update `.idea` workspace configuration to reflect changes in migrations, performance tests, and schema mappings.
Add SQLite and SQL Server-specific table creation and indexing logic for `rung`, `tag_member`, and `data_type_member` tables in migrations.
Rnemaed all the version helper functions to different name that aligns more with the database table names for easy discovery.
Bump version to 0.12.7 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Rename versioned helper functions for rung hierarchy to a unified `logic_for` function, simplify test assertions, and update workspace configuration to reflect changes.

Rename `tag_comment` table to `tag_member_comment`, update schema columns (`tag_name` to `member_path`, `tag_comment` to `comment`), and adjust related migrations, maps, transformers, and tests for consistency and improved clarity.
Update tag-related scripts: replace `tag_name` with `member_path`, add `tag_description`, and align schema with `tag_member_comment` changes.
Update tag-related scripts: replace `tag_name` with `member_path`, add `tag_description`, and rename `tag_comment` to `tag_member_comment` with schema adjustments.
Update tests: add `tag_description`, replace `tag_name` with `member_path`, and rename `tag_comment` to `tag_member_comment` across SQLite and SQL Server migration tests.
Remove `last_modified_date` from merge scripts and update test assertions (`tag_name` to `member_path`).
Update tests: replace `tag_comment` with `tag_member_comment`, adjust assertions, and update unique index to use `member_path`.
Bump version to 0.13.0 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Update `TagMemberMap`: map `parent_name` to `MemberName` instead of `LocalPath`.

Remove deprecated versioned helper functions (`tag_members_for`, `tag_comments_for`, `aoi_parameters_for`, `data_type_members_for`, `operands_for`) and associated tests, rename `M202605271010CreateLogixFor` to `M202605271010CreateLogicFor`, and update `tag_tree_from` function parameters and logic.
Rename `parent_name` to `parent_path` across tag-related scripts, migrations, maps, and tests for consistency and clarity.
Update tests: replace `tag_comment` with `tag_member_comment` in SQL Server migration tests and adjust assertions accordingly.
Bump package versions across projects, including `L5Sharp` to 7.2.0, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` to 18.6.0, `NUnit.Analyzers` to 4.14.0, and several others.
Refactor AOI and Parameter mappings: replace `ParameterRecord` with `Parameter`, update mapping logic, and clean up related code.
Refactor `Parameter` formatting logic: replace `Dimension > 0` check with `Dimensions?.IsEmpty is false` for improved null safety.
Add `ModuleConnectionMap` for module connections, update `ModuleTransformer` to generate corresponding tables, and add migration tests for `module_connection`.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.5.0 across projects, and update `TestSource` to fix version serialization issues.
Update `M202606112100CreateModuleConnectionTable`: make `rpi` column nullable
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.0 across projects.
Remove all deprecated SQL scripts and their associated logic, including merge scripts (e.g., `MergeAoi`, `MergeController`) and helper functions, as part of cleanup.
Remove all QA-related SQL scripts, procedures, functions, views, and tables as part of discontinued feature cleanup.
Refactor QA migration tests: split into migration-specific test cases for improved granularity and clarity.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and expand `ClearData` handling in `CryptoExtensions` to support additional types.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.1 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Rename `QA` to `Qa` in `ComponentOptions` and related QA migration tests for consistency.
Update `TagMemberMap` to handle null parent paths consistently, add helper extensions for `ParentPath` and `MemberOrBaseName`, and adjust `.idea` workspace configuration.
Bump project versions to 0.13.1 and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and fix null check in `CreateTagTreeFrom` migration
Bump project versions to 0.13.2.
Introduce `GetSource(scrub: true)` for sanitizing Target data and enhance module and connection mapping logic.
Add `MergeModuleConnection` logic for managing module connections in SQLite and SQL Server.
Update QA scripts to rename `environment_data/hash` to `variables_data/hash`, adjust references, and bump project versions to 0.13.3.
Fix typo in `MergeModuleConnection.sql` (`module_connetion` → `module_connection`) and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration in multiple components and add breakpoint in `ModuleTransformer` for debugging.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.2 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.

MESSAGE.value: Rename `parent_name` to `parent_path` across tag-related scripts, migrations, maps, and tests for consistency and clarity.
Update tests: replace `tag_comment` with `tag_member_comment` in SQL Server migration tests and adjust assertions accordingly.
Bump package versions across projects, including `L5Sharp` to 7.2.0, `Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk` to 18.6.0, `NUnit.Analyzers` to 4.14.0, and several others.
Refactor AOI and Parameter mappings: replace `ParameterRecord` with `Parameter`, update mapping logic, and clean up related code.
Refactor `Parameter` formatting logic: replace `Dimension > 0` check with `Dimensions?.IsEmpty is false` for improved null safety.
Add `ModuleConnectionMap` for module connections, update `ModuleTransformer` to generate corresponding tables, and add migration tests for `module_connection`.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.5.0 across projects, and update `TestSource` to fix version serialization issues.
Update `M202606112100CreateModuleConnectionTable`: make `rpi` column nullable
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.0 across projects.
Remove all deprecated SQL scripts and their associated logic, including merge scripts (e.g., `MergeAoi`, `MergeController`) and helper functions, as part of cleanup.
Remove all QA-related SQL scripts, procedures, functions, views, and tables as part of discontinued feature cleanup.
Refactor QA migration tests: split into migration-specific test cases for improved granularity and clarity.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and expand `ClearData` handling in `CryptoExtensions` to support additional types.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.1 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Rename `QA` to `Qa` in `ComponentOptions` and related QA migration tests for consistency.
Update `TagMemberMap` to handle null parent paths consistently, add helper extensions for `ParentPath` and `MemberOrBaseName`, and adjust `.idea` workspace configuration.
Bump project versions to 0.13.1 and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration and fix null check in `CreateTagTreeFrom` migration
Bump project versions to 0.13.2.
Introduce `GetSource(scrub: true)` for sanitizing Target data and enhance module and connection mapping logic.
Add `MergeModuleConnection` logic for managing module connections in SQLite and SQL Server.
Update QA scripts to rename `environment_data/hash` to `variables_data/hash`, adjust references, and bump project versions to 0.13.3.
Fix typo in `MergeModuleConnection.sql` (`module_connetion` → `module_connection`) and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
Update `.idea` workspace configuration in multiple components and add breakpoint in `ModuleTransformer` for debugging.
Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.2 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Bump `L5Sharp` and `L5Sharp.Gateway` package versions to 7.6.2 across projects and update `.idea` workspace configuration.
